Um, do you also take anything else for that asthma or is it just the Ventolin that use? Yeah just Ventolin. Okay. Have you had any hospitalizations or surgeries in the past? No, well I, I've had my, my wisdom teeth taken out and, actually yeah I had my tonsils out as well when I was 12. Okay. Um, are you on any medications besides Ventolin?
